PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jan-17-2017 Continued To Feb-07-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Caroline Hinshaw for Calvin One Deer Gavin (Trustee/nominated Executor of the will).
Lily Moallem for Myers Kenney.

Ms. Hinshaw reported that there has been a lot of settlement discussion, that most of the claims are related to Attorney and Conservator fees and that Mr. Gavin is trying to settle out. Ms. Hinshaw also stated that she believes it will cover all of the claims, that it is not necessary to probate the Estate and that her Client will petition for special administration if necessary to address all of the creditors. Ms. Moallem stated that they wanted to preserve their one year statute. The Court pointed out that there is no notice to the Public Administrator ("PA") and that the PA has priority. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to February 7, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch/John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Duong. Not reported.
